ground_truth.title: Skin Care and Repair
ground_truth.main_content:
Overview

From facial wrinkles and toenail fungus to skin cancer, cellulitis, eczema, hair loss, psoriasis, rosacea, warts and more, Skin Care and Repair is the in-depth, interactive course that answers your questions and reveals the best research-backed advice for practically any skin-related concern.

You'll discover practical, use-it-now advice to help treat 18 common skin conditions...identify the tell-tale signs of skin cancer and discover the best treatments…protect your skin with the most effective lotions, potions, and treatments…and get an in-depth look at the most effective cosmetic procedures.

Learning Objectives

- Common Skin Conditions
- Skin Protection: Lotions, Potions, and More
- Skin Cancer
- Cosmetic Procedures
